context7._comment: Live documentation lookup. Eliminates outdated API guessing.

playwright._comment: Browser automation and E2E testing. Most token-efficient browser MCP.

github._comment: PRs, issues, code search. Essential for any GitHub-based project.

_optional_servers._note: Copy into mcpServers above to enable. These are not loaded by default.

protect-mcp._comment: Ed25519 receipt signing + Cedar policy enforcement for every tool call. Zero config — auto-generates policies on first run.
protect-mcp._when: Compliance requirements, multi-agent orchestration, audit trails, or when agents handle sensitive operations.

daily_use: context7 - Live docs. Use instead of guessing API signatures.
playwright - E2E testing and browser automation. 13.7k tokens avg.
add_when_needed: protect-mcp - Cryptographic receipt signing for tool calls (when you need audit trails, policy enforcement, or compliance evidence)
_recommendations.wisdom: Start with 3 MCPs. Add only when you hit a concrete need. Most developers who start with 10+ end up using 3-4 daily.
